# SaviSanju Collections

> Premium handwoven Kanjivaram and Banarasi sarees. Authentic luxury sarees with pan-India delivery.

## About

SaviSanju Collections is an Indian luxury saree boutique specialising in authentic handwoven silk sarees.
We offer Kanjivaram, Banarasi, Crape Silk, and Tussar sarees directly to customers across India.
Prices are negotiable. Payment via COD or UPI after delivery confirmation.

## Products

- Kanjivaram Sarees – Traditional South Indian silk sarees, handwoven in Kanchipuram
- Banarasi Sarees – Handwoven silk sarees from Varanasi with zari work
- Crape Silk Sarees – Lightweight silk sarees with a crinkled texture
- Tussar Sarees – Natural wild silk sarees with a rich texture

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://savisanjucollections.vercel.app/
- Shop All Sarees: https://savisanjucollections.vercel.app/shop
- Contact: support@savisanju.com

## Pricing

All prices are in Indian Rupees (INR). Prices are negotiable — our team contacts customers to confirm
the final price before processing. Typical price range: ₹1,500 – ₹3,500 per saree.

## Delivery

- Pan-India delivery
- Estimated delivery: 5–6 business days
- Payment: COD or UPI after satisfaction

## Contact

- Email: support@savisanju.com
- WhatsApp: Available (see website)
